guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Keep INP low — keep heavy JS off the interaction path.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — the masked-LM forward pass + softmax over the 250k vocabulary runs in a Web Worker; typing is debounced (350 ms).
guidanceConsulted.evidence: headless: 392 ms fill in the worker, page responsive, 0 console errors

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Offload / break up long main-thread tasks.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — inference is off the main thread; the UI only renders the returned top-k.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: worker.js runs AutoModelForMaskedLM; xlmr.js debounces input

guidanceConsulted.query: responsive control panel without horizontal overflow
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Fluid layout; wrap chips; avoid fixed widths that overflow narrow viewports.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — flex-wrap language chips + a prediction grid that collapses columns (hides the logit column) under 560px.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: responsive-mobile=pass at 360px; mobile screenshot reviewed, no overflow

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Accessible form controls with clear, associated labels.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — the sentence <input> has an associated <label>; the top-k slider is labelled; probe/language chips are real buttons.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Label controls; announce state in a live region.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — role=status aria-live #runStatus, labelled controls, and prediction rows are keyboard-activatable buttons that fill the mask.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Cross-document view transitions for catalogue↔page nav.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — @view-transition navigation:auto in the shared public/styles.css.

followUpGoals.goal: Add a WebGPU execution-provider fast path for xlm-roberta-fill-mask (honest WASM fallback retained) as an additive enhancement.

summary: Revision-2 agent matrix pass for xlm-roberta-fill-mask: real download + on-device run verified in headless Chrome (real output samples recorded), light+dark and mobile+desktop screenshots reviewed (no overflow, legible, operable controls), console clean. Auto-checkable conformance assertions pass (14/14 tested); manual-evidenced dimensions carry the agent verdict above.
